atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling fine most days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports high blood pressure when measured at home.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient experienced mild headaches with very high blood pressure readings.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient noticed a lack of blood pressure readings since the pandemic.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some mild swelling in his lower extremities when on his feet.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies chest pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies shortness of breath.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient occasionally takes Advil or Motrin for knee or back pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's vital signs today include a blood pressure of 169/74 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's heart rate is 88 bpm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's oxygen saturation is 98%.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Jugular vein distention is not present.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Carotid bruits are absent.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lungs are clear to auscultation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes cardura 4 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a renal artery ultrasound.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a 24-hour urine collection.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers to a nutritionist for dietary counseling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician advises the patient to reduce alcohol intake to one or two drinks per week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to monitor blood pressure at home and record readings every three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician schedules a follow-up appointment in three weeks to review blood pressure monitoring data.
